headlines.title: Iran Reportedly Responds to US Peace Proposal
headlines.description: The Iranian government has reportedly sent a response to a United States peace proposal. Iranian media reports that Iran has now passed its response to Pakistani mediators, saying it focuses on ending the war and safety of maritime traffic in the Gulf and Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for Sunday TODAY.

headlines.title: Energy Sec. Wright says 'we're open to all ideas' amid calls to suspend gas tax: Full interview
headlines.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright tells Meet the Press that the Trump administration’s priority is ending Iran’s nuclear program and restoring secure shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, while ongoing tensions could keep gas prices elevated in the short term.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Trump calls Iran’s response to U.S. peace proposal ‘totally unacceptable’
headlines.description: President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s response to a U.S. proposal to bring an end to the war in the Middle East, calling the message “totally unacceptable” on Truth Social.“I have just read the response from Iran’s so-called ‘Representatives,’” Trump posted Sunday afternoon.

headlines.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend
headlines.description: Iran responded to a U.S. proposal to bring an end to the war in the Middle East, Tehran’s state media reported Sunday

headlines.title: Americans on hantavirus cruise ship head to Nebraska
headlines.description: The Americans evacuated from the deadly hantavirus cruise ship are on their way to the Nebraska Medical Center’s state of the art National Quarantine Unit. It is unclear how many of the Americans, who are all asymptomatic, will end up staying there and for how long. NBC News’ Camila Bernal has the latest.

headlines.title: Birders push back on hantavirus fears tied to Argentine city
headlines.description: The hantavirus outbreak on a cruise that departed from Argentina last month has cast an unwelcome spotlight on Tierra del Fuego, a region well known for its biodiversity and bird-watching, authorities and guides say

headlines.title: Savannah Guthrie shares a video compilation of her missing mother on Mother’s Day
headlines.description: Savannah Guthrie has shared a heart-wrenching Mother’s Day post, pleading for the public’s help in locating her missing mother and saying, “We need help.”The “TODAY” show co-anchor posted a video compilation on her Instagram on Sunday sharing sweet moments with her mother, Nancy Guthrie.“Mother, daughter, sister, Nonie — we miss you with every breath.

headlines.title: FDA claims there’s no estrogen patch shortage as women struggle to get prescriptions filled
headlines.description: The FDA removed the black box warning from hormone replacement therapies late last year, and recently, the most insured type, the estrogen patch, has been in short supply amid a boom in the therapy’s popularity.

headlines.title: Washington Wizards win the first pick in the 2026 NBA draft
headlines.description: The wizards won the NBA draft lottery Sunday, earning them the first overall pick in June’s NBA draft.

headlines.title: Govs. Wes Moore, Sarah Huckabee Sanders tackle the maternal health crisis: Full panel
headlines.description: Gov. Wes Moore (D-Md.), Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders (R-Ark.) and philanthropist Olivia Walton join Meet the Press for a Common Ground conversation around maternal health.
